Dialog.name: MND_OUT_STOP_SOUTH
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}There's no need to return[n]to the station right now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_OUT_STOP_EAST
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The dorm should be in[n]the opposite direction...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_OUT_STOP_STAIR
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I should head to the dorm for now...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_OUT_STOP
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}If we don't deal with them now, they're liable to make a move.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Our target's just ahead. Let's get ready to fight.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_STATION_STOP
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5006 0 0}It's dangerous to fight with such a small group. You should bring more people with you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_SHOP_STOP_YUKARI
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}Hey, what are you doing?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_SHOP_STOP_AEGIS
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}We do not have time to waste.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}Please focus on making the necessary preparations.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_DAIMAP_TEST
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}This map looks like it can help me[n]find my way. Where should I go...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_FLD_ORDER
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Where should I go...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_HIT_BURGERSHOP_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}There are several objects that look[n]like coffins inside the store...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_HIT_BURGERSHOP_02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Did someone forget their meal...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_HIT_BOOKSTORE_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The used bookstore is closed...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_HIT_TAKOYAKI_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}This seems to be a takoyaki[n]shop, but it's closed...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_HIT_STAIRS_EAST_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Looks like these stairs lead[n]to the second floor.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's late... I should really[n]head to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_HIT_STAIRS_WEST_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Looks like these stairs lead[n]to the second floor.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's late... I should really[n]head to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_HIT_COFFIN_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It won't budge...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_HIT_COFFIN_02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Where did everyone go...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_HIT_COFFIN_03
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}What's this doing here...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_HIT_COFFIN_04
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I wonder what's in these things...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_HIT_COFFIN_05
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Is this... a coffin?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_HIT_COFFIN_06
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}These things are everywhere...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_SHOP_STOP_YUKARI_ADD
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1062 0 0}Where do you think Amada-kun could have gone...?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}Oh, sorry. We should probably focus on the enemies right in front of us, shouldn't we?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_SHOP_STOP_AEGIS_ADD
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6001 0 0}Our target is within our immediate vicinity. Therefore, we should focus on the task at hand.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}Let us finish making all necessary preparations and subsequently engage the enemy.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_SHOP_STOP_JUNPEI_ADD
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2001 0 0}I'm kinda worried about Aragaki-san and everything...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}C'mon, let's wrap this up quick.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_OUT_STOP_ADD
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4008 0 0}If we don't deal with them now, they're liable to make a move.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Our target's just ahead. Let's get ready to fight.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_HIT_BURGERSHOP_ADD_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6001 0 0}Koromaru-san says, "Two of us are missing. Where are they?"[n]{f 1 1}
